title: Neuron property filter
description: NeuronPropertyFilter object or list of NeuronPropertyFilter objects

NeuronPropertyFilter.title: NeuronPropertyFilter
NeuronPropertyFilter.description: A single property filter: a mapping from node property name to a non-empty list of accepted values.

filter_dict.title: Filter
filter_dict.description: Filter dictionary. The list per key is NOT a multi-dimensional parameter sweep; it is the set of accepted values for the property (e.g. {'layer': ['2', '3']}).
